hook.summary: Rapid-fire FPS gameplay montage showing high-damage kills.
hook.visual_action: Player character cycles through shotgun and sniper rifle, landing headshots on low-poly enemies in a wooden barn.

scene_flow: First-person shotgun combat inside a wooden structure showing damage numbers.
Transition to sniper scope view for a long-distance kill through a window.
Switching to an assault rifle with a red-dot sight for mid-range engagement.
Final pistol kill followed by a splash screen with game characters and title.
audience_proxy: Competitive mobile gamers who enjoy stylized, low-poly FPS titles like Roblox or Krunker.
